languages.text: "Триангулировав полученные данные, предполагаю, что причина — отсутствие когнитивной обработки со стороны оператора. Вы серьезно нарушили незримую разметку данных аномалии".

traits.locale_text: "Триангулировав полученные данные, предполагаю, что причина — отсутствие когнитивной обработки со стороны оператора. Вы серьезно нарушили незримую разметку данных аномалии".

languages.text: "After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."
languages.original_text: "Триангулировав полученные данные, предполагаю, что причина — отсутствие когнитивной обработки со стороны оператора. Вы серьезно нарушили незримую разметку данных аномалии".

traits.locale_text: "After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."

"After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."

"After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."

languages.text: “对接收到的数据进行三角测量后，我推断问题源于操作者的认知处理能力不足。你已严重干扰异常现象中本不可见的数据索引。”
languages.original_text: "After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."

traits.locale_text: “对接收到的数据进行三角测量后，我推断问题源于操作者的认知处理能力不足。你已严重干扰异常现象中本不可见的数据索引。”

languages.text: « Après triangulation des données reçues, j'avance comme cause une absence de traitement cognitif de la part de l'{mf|opérateur|opératrice}. Vous avez considérablement perturbé l'indexation invisible des données de l'anomalie. »
languages.original_text: "After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."

traits.locale_text: « Après triangulation des données reçues, j'avance comme cause une absence de traitement cognitif de la part de l'{mf|opérateur|opératrice}. Vous avez considérablement perturbé l'indexation invisible des données de l'anomalie. »

languages.text: "Edinilen verilerin nirengisini aldıktan sonra asıl sebebin, operatör tarafında bilişsel süreç eksikliği olduğunu düşünüyorum. Anomalinin görünmeyen veri dizinlemesini ciddi derecede bozmuşsun."
languages.original_text: "After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."

traits.locale_text: "Edinilen verilerin nirengisini aldıktan sonra asıl sebebin, operatör tarafında bilişsel süreç eksikliği olduğunu düşünüyorum. Anomalinin görünmeyen veri dizinlemesini ciddi derecede bozmuşsun."

languages.text: «Tras triangular los datos recibidos, propongo que la causa es la ausencia de procesamiento cognitivo por parte del operador. Ha interrumpido severamente el invisible indexado de datos sobre la anomalía».
languages.original_text: "After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."

traits.locale_text: «Tras triangular los datos recibidos, propongo que la causa es la ausencia de procesamiento cognitivo por parte del operador. Ha interrumpido severamente el invisible indexado de datos sobre la anomalía».

languages.text: "Nach Triangulation der erhaltenen Daten proponiere ich als Ursache einen Mangel an kognitiver Verarbeitung auf Seiten des Operators. Ihr habt die unsichtbare Datenindizierung der Anomalie empfindlich gestört."
languages.original_text: "After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."

traits.locale_text: "Nach Triangulation der erhaltenen Daten proponiere ich als Ursache einen Mangel an kognitiver Verarbeitung auf Seiten des Operators. Ihr habt die unsichtbare Datenindizierung der Anomalie empfindlich gestört."

languages.text: 「受信したデータを三角測量した結果、原因はオペレーターの認知処理の不足であると推測します。あなたは異常の目に見えないデータの索引を深刻に妨害しました。」
languages.original_text: "After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."

traits.locale_text: 「受信したデータを三角測量した結果、原因はオペレーターの認知処理の不足であると推測します。あなたは異常の目に見えないデータの索引を深刻に妨害しました。」
